content:
- Finished the postgres role reconciliation task end-to-end and pushed commit f323c06 to origin/master.
- Post-commit hook rebuilt/published the docs repo successfully as pgtuskmaster-docs commit 33c1160c.
- Working tree should now be clean; task file is marked completed with passes=true and Ralph task switch has already been run.

- A parallel worker completed the Ralph closeout and pushed master while I was in the docs workflow.
- Verified HEAD is now 2658881 on master/origin-master, the task file is completed with passes=true, and the required validation gates were already green on the final tree.
- Removed my last local in-progress docs tweak so git status is clean and the workspace matches the completed pushed state.

- Read the Ralph progress log for Choose-Task and loaded current task summaries.
- Saw at least two active tasks in current_tasks.md and confirmed the main ctl story blockers are already marked done in current_tasks_done.md.
- Need the full active task registry without truncation, then resolve blocker text carefully and write the single chosen task path to .ralph/current_task.txt.

- Resolved the active backlog: only two unblocked failing non-bug tasks remain, both low priority.
- Chose the cert-reload follow-up over the logging simplification refactor because it is directly enabled by the already-finished story 08 API work and is the smaller, dependency-driven next increment.
- Next action is to replace .ralph/current_task.txt with the cert-reload task path and stop immediately.

- Confirmed the more logical next task is the cert reload follow-up because /reload/certs already exists from completed story 08 and this work is the direct next increment on that surface.
- Wrote .ralph/current_task.txt with .ralph/tasks/story-cert-reload-postgres-sighup/01-task-send-postgres-sighup-after-certificate-reload.md.
- Stopping immediately after task selection as instructed.

- Read previous progress and current task pointer.
- Current task is .ralph/tasks/story-cert-reload-postgres-sighup/01-task-send-postgres-sighup-after-certificate-reload.md.
- Opening the task file now to determine whether this turn is a type-design-only pass or an execution pass.

- Task file has no explicit execution marker, so I need to do the type-design-first pass and stop.
- Started locating the implemented /reload/certs route and the existing postmaster PID helpers to decide which types to reshape first.
- Intention for this turn: change relevant types and task plan only, not compile-fix, then quit.

- Confirmed /reload/certs currently returns a weak boolean and has no PostgreSQL reload concept yet.
- Reading config/runtime shapes now so the new ADTs can carry the managed data-dir identity without ad hoc strings.
- I expect to introduce a small shared postmaster target/result model and widen the reload response away from a bool.

- Finished the required design-only pass for the cert-reload-plus-postgres-sighup task.
- Added a new shared src/process/postmaster.rs ADT boundary for managed postmaster target/pid/verified-process/signal delivery/error taxonomy.
- Replaced the API-side reload response and reloader types with a stricter coordinator/result shape, updated startup/test-support call sites, and appended a design handoff ending in NOW EXECUTE to the task file.
- Intentionally stopped before compile repair, make targets, docs, task switch, commit, or push because the task file started without NOW EXECUTE and the instructions require quitting immediately after the type-design pass.
- Next turn should execute the plan: finish extraction from src/process/worker.rs, repair compiler fallout, add tests, run make check/lint/test/test-long, then docs via k2-docs-loop.

- Read the current certificate-reload task and confirmed it is now in NOW EXECUTE mode, so this turn should complete implementation rather than another design-only pass.
- Inspected the in-progress diff: API response/handle types were already widened, a new src/process/postmaster.rs exists, but src/process/worker.rs still carries duplicate postmaster lookup helpers and tests still assume only a status code.
- Next I need to finish the process helper extraction, wire tests/dev-support to the richer reload behavior, then run the required make targets before docs and final Ralph closeout.

- Finished the main code patches: src/process/worker.rs now uses the shared process::postmaster ADTs for start-postgres preflight, and new postmaster/API tests cover missing/stale/mismatch plus API-failure-prevents-signal ordering.
- Focused cargo nextest mostly passed; the remaining route-success failure is in the test harness path, not the failure taxonomy. I also hit an intermittent cargo archive/object-file build failure when rerunning a narrowed filter.
- Next I need to diagnose the remaining success-path test by capturing the 500 response body, then clear the warning/build-noise and move to the required make targets.
